name: FIB Media (Fill in the Blank with Image)
qcPdf: Author Test Cases - FIBMedia test cases.pdf
architectureNote: FIB Media is the FIB template (templates/fib/) in 'FIB with Image' mode (currSettings.fibWithImage). Reuses FIB drop/setup infra. The QC suite is dominated by file-picker uploads, resize, autosave/refresh, network/quota and Reader rendering, which are not assertable in the authoring DOM with Cypress alone — hence a high deferred ratio.
